## Problem

What is unclear, missing, outdated, or hard to follow?

## Suggested improvement

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Verification

- [ ] I checked the current documentation
- [ ] I confirmed the target page or link still exists
- [ ] I can keep the change scoped
